# Pull Request Summary

## Purpose

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Scope

- [ ] In scope documented
- [ ] Out of scope documented

## Governance Checks

- [ ] Evidence-first: links or artifacts attached
- [ ] No unapproved production-impacting change
- [ ] Change control entry added if scope/timeline changed
- [ ] Related decision or risk updated when needed

## Validation

- [ ] Markdown lint passes
- [ ] Links checked
- [ ] Reviewer can reproduce key outcomes

- Decision ID:
- Change ID:
- Risk ID:
